description: Curated registry of popular MCP servers surfaced by the in-app marketplace at Settings → MCP → Browse. Edit this file via PR; the in-app marketplace fetches it live.

servers.name: Filesystem
servers.description: Read, write, search, and list files in a folder you allow. Essential for any 'edit this codebase' task.

argPrompts.label: Folder to expose
argPrompts.description: Absolute path. The server can read/write files inside this folder only.

servers.author: Anthropic

servers.name: GitHub
servers.description: Read issues, PRs, repos and files. Create comments, manage labels, search across code.

envPrompts.label: GitHub token
envPrompts.description: Create one at github.com/settings/tokens — needs at minimum the `repo` scope.

servers.author: Anthropic

servers.name: Memory · knowledge graph
servers.description: Persistent entity-relationship graph the AI can read and write across sessions. Remembers people, projects, decisions.
servers.author: Anthropic

servers.name: Brave Search
servers.description: Web + local search via the Brave Search API. Free tier covers 2k queries/month.

envPrompts.label: Brave Search API key
envPrompts.description: Sign up free at brave.com/search/api — copy the key.

servers.author: Anthropic

servers.name: Puppeteer browser
servers.description: Drive a headless Chrome — navigate, click, fill forms, screenshot pages. Browser automation for any website.
servers.author: Anthropic

servers.name: Fetch · web pages
servers.description: Pull a URL and return its readable content (markdown by default). Lighter than Puppeteer when you just need to read a page.
servers.author: Anthropic

servers.name: PostgreSQL
servers.description: Read-only SQL access to a Postgres database. Run queries, inspect schema, debug data issues from chat.
servers.author: Anthropic

servers.name: SQLite
servers.description: Read/write access to a SQLite file. Great for local data exploration, prototypes, or any .sqlite/.db file on disk.

argPrompts.label: SQLite file path
argPrompts.description: Absolute path to a .sqlite or .db file.

servers.author: Anthropic

servers.name: Slack
servers.description: Send messages, read channels, manage threads. Both DMs and channels.

envPrompts.label: Slack bot token
envPrompts.description: Bot user OAuth token from api.slack.com — starts with xoxb-.

envPrompts.label: Slack workspace ID
envPrompts.description: Your workspace ID — e.g. T01234567 (find via the Slack admin URL).

servers.author: Anthropic

servers.name: Sequential thinking
servers.description: Adds a 'think step by step' tool the model can call to reason through hard problems via an explicit scratchpad.
servers.author: Anthropic

servers.name: Git
servers.description: Read repo history, diffs, blame, file content at any commit. Run searches across the working tree without leaving the chat.

argPrompts.label: Repository folder
argPrompts.description: Absolute path to a local git repository.

servers.author: Anthropic

servers.name: GitLab
servers.description: GitLab equivalent of the GitHub server — issues, MRs, repos, files, search. Works against gitlab.com or self-hosted.

envPrompts.label: GitLab token
envPrompts.description: Create at gitlab.com/-/user_settings/personal_access_tokens — needs at minimum the `api` scope.

envPrompts.label: GitLab API URL (optional)
envPrompts.description: Leave blank for gitlab.com. For self-hosted, e.g. https://gitlab.company.com/api/v4.

servers.author: Anthropic

servers.name: Google Drive
servers.description: Search and read files in your Google Drive — Docs, Sheets, Slides, PDFs, anything indexed by Drive search. Requires a Google Cloud OAuth setup (one-time, ~5 min).

envPrompts.label: Path to credentials.json
envPrompts.description: Absolute path to the OAuth credentials file you generate by following the server's setup (Google Cloud project → Drive API → OAuth creds → run the auth script). See the docs link.

servers.author: Anthropic

servers.name: Google Maps
servers.description: Place search, directions, geocoding, distance matrix. Anywhere the model needs real-world location data.

envPrompts.label: Google Maps API key
envPrompts.description: Create at console.cloud.google.com → APIs & Services → Credentials.

servers.author: Anthropic

servers.name: Redis
servers.description: Read/write key-value access to a Redis instance. Useful for inspecting cached data or quickly stashing notes.

argPrompts.label: Redis URL
argPrompts.description: Connection string — redis://localhost:6379 for a default local instance.

servers.author: Anthropic

servers.name: Sentry
servers.description: Pull issue + event details from Sentry. Lets the model triage exceptions and walk you through what crashed.

envPrompts.label: Sentry auth token
envPrompts.description: Create at sentry.io/settings/account/api/auth-tokens — needs `event:read` and `project:read`.

servers.author: Anthropic

servers.name: Time
servers.description: Timezone-aware time queries — convert between zones, parse 'now in Tokyo', schedule reminders. Tiny but surprisingly used.
servers.author: Anthropic

servers.name: EverArt
servers.description: Image generation via EverArt. Multiple models, prompt-to-image — useful when the user wants visuals during a chat.

envPrompts.label: EverArt API key
envPrompts.description: Sign up at everart.ai to get a key.

servers.author: Anthropic

servers.name: AWS Knowledge Base
servers.description: Query an AWS Bedrock knowledge base — RAG-style retrieval against documents you've indexed. Good for company docs.

envPrompts.label: AWS region
envPrompts.description: e.g. us-east-1

servers.author: Anthropic

servers.name: Everything (demo)
servers.description: A reference server exposing every MCP feature — prompts, resources, tools, sampling. Great for testing the agent loop.
servers.author: Anthropic

servers.name: Notion
servers.description: Read + write Notion pages, databases, and blocks. Search across your workspace, append blocks, query databases. Maintained by Notion themselves.

envPrompts.label: Notion API headers (JSON)
envPrompts.description: Paste: {"Authorization":"Bearer YOUR_TOKEN","Notion-Version":"2022-06-28"} — get token at notion.so/profile/integrations.

servers.author: Notion

servers.name: Supabase
servers.description: Inspect and query Supabase projects — list tables, run SQL, manage migrations, check logs. Maintained by Supabase.

envPrompts.label: Supabase access token
envPrompts.description: Create at supabase.com/dashboard/account/tokens.

servers.author: Supabase

servers.name: Cloudflare
servers.description: Manage Cloudflare resources — Workers, KV, R2, D1, observability. First connect opens your browser for one-time OAuth login; later restarts are instant.
servers.author: Cloudflare

servers.name: Stripe
servers.description: Stripe account ops — customers, products, payments, invoices, subscriptions. Maintained by Stripe.

envPrompts.label: Stripe secret key
envPrompts.description: Restricted API key recommended — create at dashboard.stripe.com/apikeys.

servers.author: Stripe

servers.name: Tavily Search
servers.description: AI-optimised web search with quick-answer summarisation. Alternative to Brave Search; better at research-style queries that need synthesised results.

envPrompts.label: Tavily API key
envPrompts.description: Free tier: 1000 searches/month. Sign up at tavily.com.

servers.author: Tavily

servers.name: Perplexity Ask
servers.description: Real-time web-aware Q&A via Perplexity's Sonar models. Good for research questions where you want a synthesised answer with citations.

envPrompts.label: Perplexity API key
envPrompts.description: Get one at perplexity.ai/settings/api.

servers.author: Perplexity

servers.name: Linear
servers.description: Read + create Linear issues, projects, cycles. Search across your workspace, transition status, add comments.

envPrompts.label: Linear API key
envPrompts.description: Create at linear.app/settings/api.

servers.author: Community

servers.name: Docker
servers.description: Manage Docker containers, images, volumes, networks. List/inspect/start/stop/log without leaving chat.
servers.author: Community

servers.name: Obsidian
servers.description: Read + write Obsidian vault notes. Search across your vault, append to notes, follow backlinks. Uses the Local REST API plugin.

envPrompts.label: Obsidian Local REST API key
envPrompts.description: Install the 'Local REST API' plugin in Obsidian → Settings → copy the API key.

servers.author: Community

servers.name: YouTube transcripts
servers.description: Fetch YouTube video transcripts by URL or ID. Useful for summarising videos / pulling quotes for chat context.
servers.author: Community

servers.name: Reddit
servers.description: Browse + search Reddit — read posts and comments, look up subreddit activity. Read-only; no auth needed for public content.
servers.author: Community

servers.name: Spotify
servers.description: Search tracks/artists/albums, control playback, manage playlists. Requires a Spotify developer app + your OAuth.

envPrompts.label: Spotify client ID
envPrompts.description: Create at developer.spotify.com/dashboard.

servers.author: Community

servers.name: MongoDB
servers.description: Read + write a MongoDB database. List collections, query documents, aggregate. Good for debugging app data live.

envPrompts.label: MongoDB connection string
envPrompts.description: e.g. mongodb://localhost:27017 or your Atlas URI.

servers.author: Community

servers.name: ElevenLabs
servers.description: Text-to-speech via ElevenLabs voices. Useful when the AI wants to generate audio output for a chat reply or save a narration.

envPrompts.label: ElevenLabs API key
envPrompts.description: Free tier: 10k characters/month. Sign up at elevenlabs.io.

servers.author: ElevenLabs
